basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Junior Administrative Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 43 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Junior Administrative Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website aiims.edu. A total of 43 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Junior Administrative Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details and relaxation criteria.

qualification.details: Junior Administrative Assistant: 12th pass or equivalent and 2 years regular service in Level-1 (GP Rs. 1800).

salary_details.pay_scale: Level-2 in the pay matrix of 7th CPC
salary_details.details: Level-2 in the pay matrix of 7th CPC

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Junior Administrative Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: aiims.edu.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Junior Administrative Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for the receipt of applications for the AIIMS Delhi Junior Administrative Assistant recruitment is 10 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Administrative Assistant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 43 vacancies for the Junior Administrative Assistant post in the All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Administrative Assistant post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Junior Administrative Assistant post is a 12th pass or equivalent. Additionally, candidates must have 2 years of regular service in Level-1 (GP Rs. 1800).

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for the Junior Administrative Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Junior Administrative Assistant post will receive a salary as per Level-2 in the pay matrix of the 7th Central Pay Commission (CPC).

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Junior Administrative Assistant post?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Junior Administrative Assistant post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Administrative Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Administrative Assistant role will be based on a departmental qualifying examination.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article by clicking on the provided link for the Official Notification PDF.

faq.question: Q9. What is the address for sending the offline application?
faq.answer: The specific address for sending the completed offline application form will be mentioned in the official notification. Candidates are advised to refer to the notification for detailed instructions.

faq.question: Q10. Does AIIMS Delhi offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Information regarding age relaxation for reserved categories is not explicitly detailed here. Candidates are strongly advised to consult the official notification for comprehensive details on age limits and any applicable relaxations.
